name: Apricot Almond Bark
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 10x15-inch jelly roll pan with waxed paper.
2. Melt the white chocolate and shortening in the top part of a double boiler.
3. Stir in the toasted almonds and apricot jelly beans until combined.
4. Spread the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Chill for 10 minutes to allow it to set.
6. Score the cooled mixture into 2x3-inch bars with a knife.
7. Once firm, cut the bars apart.
